# Quaternius — Ultimate Modular Males

Bundled assets:

- `Swat.gltf` — original skinned operator with 24 clips.
- `Swat_FirstPersonArms.glb` — Atomic Acres derivative retaining the original arm/hand/finger skin weights and skeleton while removing torso geometry at the authored bind-pose shoulder seam (`abs(X) < 0.18`); generated in Blender 5.1.1 for first-person use. SHA-256: `f5ea36848878cc3d94a661716879f1cc56d04cdeaf00ca826eacacca9f5332a8`.

- Creator: Quaternius (`@Quaternius`)
- Official pack page: <https://quaternius.com/packs/ultimatemodularcharacters.html>
- Official download folder: <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1USAAquX2JJWuA2m6zol0KUkFe3UkZ8zX>
- Selected source path: `Individual Characters/glTF/Swat.gltf`
- Retrieved: 2026-07-13
- License: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain Dedication; preserved verbatim in `LICENSE.txt`
- Source SHA-256: `622b3f36fcac90539ef8f7121ec1f11b5e1ae603a085019b3fa96eba20dddfd3`

The file is an embedded-buffer glTF 2.0 asset with five skinned meshes, one skeleton and 24 named animation clips. Atomic Acres may optimize or derive first-person/LOD variants, but this source file and provenance record remain the reference for verification.
